dialogue_text: and these are my friends, the Tin Woodman and the Cowardly Lion; and we are going to the Emerald City.
source_excerpt: "I am Dorothy," answered the girl, "and these are my friends, the Tin Woodman and the Cowardly Lion; and we are going to the Emerald City."

speaker.notes: Attributed through a role label rather than a canonical name.
